title: Beyond the Horizon of Our Dreams

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since
<chrname> and I began our journey.
One day, while we take a well-deserved break...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excellent. We're all here. Shall we enter?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Where should we go first?! I heard a famous
waffle truck's here today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Did you say waffles?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I mean, we came here to watch the races. We'll
have to save the snacking for later, of course.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The racers in the paddock will be making their
debut in the next race, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you can see the nervousness written all
over their faces.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
At the same time... there's a sharpness in their
gazes that shows their conviction.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Each and every one of them is starting their
journey here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Did you see the winner?! The way she
closed that last 200 meters! She was practically
FLYING! I'm sooo touched!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The second-place finisher was amazing too! Did
you see the way she kept chasing her opponent?
What a great race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No matter the race, or who the racers are, seeing
them in action always makes me well up with
emotion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After all, they're putting everything into chasing
after their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Putting everything... into chasing their dreams,
huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, one cannot truly chase after their
dreams alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Whether it be a rival, friends, teammates, or a
trainer, we can only run with all our strength if we
have someone holding us up.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I wanna race just like that too!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's enter Tracen Academy together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And watching someone race toward their dreams
inspires others to do the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So let us imbue each of our steps with strength,
so that we may show someone that their dreams
are possible.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you got it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, since we do have time until the next race,
why don't we get some of those waffles?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch them walk off, I realize it's been three
years since <chrname> began racing
toward her dreams as well. Perhaps she's already
inspired someone to follow in her footsteps.
